name: PFSection
description: Workspace region for grouping related content into a clear floor area.
responsibility: Group related content into a clear workspace region.

requirements: Section headings must remain semantic and navigable.
Grouped content must preserve reading order.
Regions should be identifiable when complex layouts are used.

composition_rules: Use PFSection to define workspace hierarchy before placing child surfaces.
Sections should group related content only.
Executive and focus variants should reduce competing visual noise.
anti_patterns: using sections for purely decorative separation
grouping unrelated content without a shared purpose
creating deep nesting that obscures workspace hierarchy
